input: Identify four drugs that are commonly administered with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG> in the most recent hospital stay.
output: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;

input: What are the leading 3 diagnoses from last month in patients aged 60 or more?
output: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 60 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;

input: For the <MEASUREMENT>3022217</MEASUREMENT> test last March, what percentile is 1.3 among same-age patients as <PERSON_ID>4924550704026979905</PERSON_ID>?
output: WITH reference_patient AS (SELECT p.person_id, DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) AS age FROM person AS p WHERE p.person_id = 4924550704026979905), patients_same_age AS (SELECT p.person_id FROM person AS p JOIN reference_patient r ON DATE_PART('year', AGE(MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1), p.birth_datetime)) = r.age), march_last_year_measurements AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN patients_same_age AS pa ON m.person_id = pa.person_id WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 3022217 AND m.measurement_date >= MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 3, 1) AND m.measurement_date < MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int - 1, 4, 1) AND m.value_as_number IS NOT NULL), ranked_measurements AS (SELECT mlm.value_as_number, percent_rank() OVER (ORDER BY mlm.value_as_number) AS pct FROM march_last_year_measurements AS mlm) SELECT rm.pct AS percentile FROM ranked_measurements AS rm WHERE rm.value_as_number >= 1.3 ORDER BY rm.value_as_number LIMIT 1;

input: Provide the 4 most prescribed drugs for young women (20s) after being diagnosed with <CONDITION>318800</CONDITION> this month/02.
output: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 318800 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 2) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 20 AND 29), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '2 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 4;

input: Give me the second previous day that patient <PERSON_ID>6657709864320620215</PERSON_ID> was given <DRUG>1742258</DRUG> along with <DRUG>40175218</DRUG> on their first ICU visit.
output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' AND vd.person_id = 6657709864320620215 ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), drug_exposures_filtered AS (SELECT de.drug_concept_id, de.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN first_icu_visit AS fiv ON de.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id IN (1742258, 40175218)), both_drugs_same_day AS (SELECT def.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposures_filtered AS def GROUP BY def.drug_exposure_start_date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT def.drug_concept_id) = 2) SELECT bsd.drug_exposure_start_date FROM both_drugs_same_day AS bsd ORDER BY bsd.drug_exposure_start_date DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1;

input: Identify the number of patients diagnosed with <CONDITION>4209423</CONDITION> after being diagnosed with, within 3 months <CONDITION>437474</CONDITION> from the start of last year onward.
output: WITH base_dates AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 437474 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'), next_condition AS (SELECT b.person_id FROM base_dates AS b JOIN condition_occurrence AS c ON b.person_id = c.person_id AND c.condition_concept_id = 4209423 AND c.condition_start_date > b.condition_start_date AND c.condition_start_date <= b.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '3 months') SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS patient_count FROM next_condition;

input: What are the leading three procedures in patients aged in their fifties on first admission?
output: WITH first_visits AS (SELECT vo.person_id, MIN(vo.visit_occurrence_id) AS first_visit_id, MIN(vo.visit_start_date) AS first_visit_date FROM visit_occurrence AS vo GROUP BY vo.person_id), patients_50s AS (SELECT fv.first_visit_id, fv.first_visit_date FROM first_visits AS fv JOIN person AS p ON fv.person_id = p.person_id WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(fv.first_visit_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59), procedures_50s AS (SELECT pr.procedure_concept_id FROM procedure_occurrence AS pr JOIN patients_50s AS p50 ON pr.visit_occurrence_id = p50.first_visit_id) SELECT c.concept_name, p.procedure_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS procedure_count FROM procedures_50s AS p JOIN concept AS c ON p.procedure_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY p.procedure_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY procedure_count DESC LIMIT 3;

input: What are the 5 most frequently observed specimens that patients have been tested during the same month as having received a <PROCEDURE>4300757</PROCEDURE> procedure during that hospital visit?
output: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Was <DRUG>40173098</DRUG> prescribed to <PERSON_ID>6264555136921102118</PERSON_ID> during the initial ICU encounter?

input: Can you tell how many hours patient <PERSON_ID>1832753164987106308</PERSON_ID> has been in the ICU?

input: What are the top 3 lab tests frequently ordered after diagnosis with <CONDITION>4229440</CONDITION> during the same ICU stay up to 2203?
output: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 4229440 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2204-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2204-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

input: At what monthly maximum were patients first diagnosed with <CONDITION>316135</CONDITION> in the intensive therapy unit?
output: WITH first_icu_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vd.person_id) vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.person_id, vd.visit_detail_start_datetime), icu_diagnoses AS (SELECT co.person_id, DATE_TRUNC('month', co.condition_start_datetime) AS diagnosis_month FROM first_icu_visits AS fiv JOIN condition_occurrence AS co ON co.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 316135), monthly_counts AS (SELECT icd.diagnosis_month, COUNT(DISTINCT icd.person_id) AS patient_count FROM icu_diagnoses AS icd GROUP BY icd.diagnosis_month) SELECT mc.diagnosis_month, mc.patient_count AS max_monthly_patient_count FROM monthly_counts AS mc WHERE mc.patient_count = (SELECT MAX(patient_count) FROM monthly_counts);

input: Can you tell me the organism detected in the next-to-last <MEASUREMENT>4036044</MEASUREMENT> test for patient <PERSON_ID>517101686241972750</PERSON_ID> this current month?

input: How much did the <MEASUREMENT>3027018</MEASUREMENT> change from the first measurement in the initial hospital stay to the second measurement in the final ICU visit for patient <PERSON_ID>5753387128065316976</PERSON_ID>?
output: WITH last_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), second_icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN last_icu_visit AS l ON m.visit_detail_id = l.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 3027018 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1), first_hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 5753387128065316976 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 3027018 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT fhm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, sim.value_as_number AS second_icu_value, sim.value_as_number - fhm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM first_hospital_measurement AS fhm CROSS JOIN second_icu_measurement AS sim;

input: Following a diagnosis of <CONDITION>441258</CONDITION> since last month, what are the three most frequently collected specimens within 14 days?
output: WITH condition_occurrence_filtered AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 441258 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'), specimen_within_14_days AS (SELECT s.specimen_concept_id FROM specimen AS s JOIN condition_occurrence_filtered AS cof ON s.person_id = cof.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime BETWEEN cof.condition_start_datetime AND cof.condition_start_datetime + INTERVAL '14 days') SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name AS specimen_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM specimen_within_14_days AS s JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;

input: How long has it been since the 2nd prescription of <DRUG>1308877</DRUG> for patient <PERSON_ID>7767928252036371506</PERSON_ID> during the ongoing hospital stay?

input: Which specialty does the physician have who was responsible for a <PROCEDURE>2779573</PROCEDURE> procedure on patient <PERSON_ID>3856814790790267215</PERSON_ID> on the last hospital admission?

input: What are the six leading conditions persisting for more than a year among patients between 50 and 59 years old until the end of January 2187?
output: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;

input: Retrieve the initial verbatim value of the condition status for <CONDITION>4049417</CONDITION> in patient <PERSON_ID>131321665335914878</PERSON_ID>, after the end of <CONDITION>43530818</CONDITION> last month.
output: WITH diagnosis_end AS (SELECT co.condition_end_datetime AS last_end_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 131321665335914878 AND co.condition_concept_id = 43530818 AND co.condition_end_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month' AND co.condition_end_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY co.condition_end_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), target_condition AS (SELECT con.condition_status_source_value FROM condition_occurrence AS con JOIN diagnosis_end AS de ON con.condition_start_datetime > de.last_end_datetime WHERE con.person_id = 131321665335914878 AND con.condition_concept_id = 4049417 ORDER BY con.condition_start_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT tc.condition_status_source_value FROM target_condition AS tc;

input: What is the number of deaths caused by <CONDITION>312327</CONDITION> among males aged 30-39 after receiving a <PROCEDURE>2004844</PROCEDURE> procedure and determine differences between pre- and post-2010.
output: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

input: How many deaths were caused by <CONDITION>312327</CONDITION> among men in their 30s who had a <PROCEDURE>2004844</PROCEDURE> procedure, contrasting pre- and post-2010 outcomes.
output: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

input: Determine how many deaths occurred due to <CONDITION>312327</CONDITION> among men in their 30s who had a <PROCEDURE>2004844</PROCEDURE> procedure, both before and after the year 2010.
output: WITH deaths_total AS (SELECT d.person_id, d.death_date, d.death_datetime, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(d.death_date, p.birth_datetime)) AS age_at_death FROM death AS d JOIN person AS p ON d.person_id = p.person_id WHERE d.cause_concept_id = 312327 AND p.gender_concept_id = 8507), qualified_deaths AS (SELECT dt.death_date FROM deaths_total AS dt JOIN procedure_occurrence AS po ON dt.person_id = po.person_id AND po.procedure_concept_id = 2004844 AND po.procedure_datetime < dt.death_datetime WHERE dt.age_at_death BETWEEN 30 AND 39), death_before AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_before FROM qualified_deaths AS q WHERE q.death_date < DATE '2010-01-01'), death_after AS(SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_after FROM qualified_deaths AS qd WHERE qd.death_date >= DATE '2010-01-01') SELECT db.count_before, da.count_after, da.count_after - db.count_before AS difference FROM death_before AS db CROSS JOIN death_after AS da;

input: Determine how many individuals born in 2198 with confirmed <CONDITION>434610</CONDITION> persisting longer than 4 months started a course of <DRUG>45776408</DRUG> and started their course post 11:00 AM yesterday with more than 20 days' duration?
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM person AS p JOIN condition_occurrence AS c ON p.person_id = c.person_id JOIN drug_exposure AS d ON p.person_id = d.person_id WHERE p.year_of_birth = 2198 AND c.condition_concept_id = 434610 AND c.condition_end_date > c.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '4 months' AND d.drug_concept_id = 45776408 AND d.days_supply > 20 AND d.drug_exposure_start_datetime > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '11 hours';

input: For the most recent 5 patients who had a <PROCEDURE>42536500</PROCEDURE> after their last stop of <DRUG>1308251</DRUG> taken via <DRUG_ROUTE>4156707</DRUG_ROUTE>, what were the discontinuation date and reason?
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 1308251 AND de.route_concept_id = 4156707), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 42536500 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: What was the usage instruction from doctor <PROVIDER_ID>2187407720534689396</PROVIDER_ID> for the drug <DRUG>45776699</DRUG> prescribed to patient <PERSON_ID>9179311870179794848</PERSON_ID> in September?
output: WITH last_month_dates AS (SELECT CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) > 9 THEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '8 months' ELSE DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') + INTERVAL '8 months' END AS start, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) > 9 THEN DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '9 months' ELSE DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year') + INTERVAL '9 months' END AS end), month_visits AS (SELECT vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo JOIN last_month_dates AS lmd ON vo.visit_start_date >= lmd.start AND vo.visit_start_date < lmd.end WHERE vo.person_id = 9179311870179794848) SELECT de.sig FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN month_visits AS mv ON de.visit_occurrence_id = mv.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 45776699 AND de.provider_id = 2187407720534689396;

input: What instruction did doctor <PROVIDER_ID>2187407720534689396</PROVIDER_ID> provide for prescribing <DRUG>45776699</DRUG> during the visit of patient <PERSON_ID>9179311870179794848</PERSON_ID> last September?

input: Was someone from the immediate family (parent/sibling) of patient <PERSON_ID>2167816630450077</PERSON_ID> diagnosed with condition <CONDITION>1076483</CONDITION> within hundred days of the patient's first diagnosis?
output: WITH parent_sibling AS (SELECT DISTINCT fr.fact_id_1 AS patient_id FROM fact_relationship AS fr WHERE fr.relationship_concept_id IN (4292398, 4232263) AND fr.fact_id_2 = 2167816630450077), patient_condition AS (SELECT co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 2167816630450077 AND co.condition_concept_id = 1076483 ORDER BY co.condition_start_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM condition_occurrence AS co2 JOIN parent_sibling AS ps ON co2.person_id = ps.patient_id JOIN patient_condition AS pc ON co2.condition_start_datetime >= pc.condition_start_datetime AND co2.condition_start_datetime <= pc.condition_start_datetime + interval '100 days' WHERE co2.condition_concept_id = 1076483);

input: Since the beginning of last month, which 5 specimens were most frequently collected within 14 days of a <CONDITION>760859</CONDITION> diagnosis?
output: WITH condition_occurrence_filtered AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 760859 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'), specimen_within_14_days AS (SELECT s.specimen_concept_id FROM specimen AS s JOIN condition_occurrence_filtered AS cof ON s.person_id = cof.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime BETWEEN cof.condition_start_datetime AND cof.condition_start_datetime + INTERVAL '14 days') SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name AS specimen_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM specimen_within_14_days AS s JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Which specimens have been tested the most within 14 days after a <CONDITION>760859</CONDITION> diagnosis since last month? Top five, please.

input: What are the most prescribed five drugs for women in their 40s, diagnosed on this month/16 with <CONDITION>134865</CONDITION>, within 23 days?
output: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 134865 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 16) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 40 AND 49), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '23 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 5;

output: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 134865 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 16) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 40 AND 49), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '23 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 5;

input: Please provide the number of hours since patient <PERSON_ID>6102133621015</PERSON_ID> entered ICU in the current visit.
output: SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - vd.visit_detail_start_datetime)) / 3600, 2) AS hours_in_icu FROM visit_occurrence AS vo JOIN visit_detail AS vd ON vd.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vo.person_id = 6102133621015 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Which date marks the second most recent instance of same-day prescriptions of <DRUG>43770380</DRUG> and <DRUG>587128</DRUG> for patient <PERSON_ID>92785</PERSON_ID> during the initial ICU visit?
output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' AND vd.person_id = 92785 ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1), drug_exposures_filtered AS (SELECT de.drug_concept_id, de.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN first_icu_visit AS fiv ON de.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id IN (43770380, 587128)), both_drugs_same_day AS (SELECT def.drug_exposure_start_date FROM drug_exposures_filtered AS def GROUP BY def.drug_exposure_start_date HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT def.drug_concept_id) = 2) SELECT bsd.drug_exposure_start_date FROM both_drugs_same_day AS bsd ORDER BY bsd.drug_exposure_start_date DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1;

input: List the top 3 drugs frequently given with <DRUG>742142</DRUG> at the patient's most recent hospital visit.
output: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_742142 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 742142), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_742142 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 742142) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;

input: Identify the number of patients, born in 1953, that were diagnosed with condition <CONDITION>42597124</CONDITION> for over 36 months and got <DRUG>1146757</DRUG> prescribed for a duration of more than 365 days once the time passed 8:30 AM yesterday?
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM person AS p JOIN condition_occurrence AS c ON p.person_id = c.person_id JOIN drug_exposure AS d ON p.person_id = d.person_id WHERE p.year_of_birth = 1953 AND c.condition_concept_id = 42597124 AND c.condition_end_date > c.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '36 months' AND d.drug_concept_id = 45776408 AND d.days_supply > 365 AND d.drug_exposure_start_datetime > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' + INTERVAL '8.5 hours';

input: How many ongoing patients belong to the 90-99 years demographic?
output: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.person_id) AS patient_count FROM person AS p JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON p.person_id = vo.person_id WHERE vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 AND DATE_PART('year', AGE(vo.visit_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 90 AND 99;

input: For the last 16 patients who underwent a <PROCEDURE>1073418</PROCEDURE> procedure after the last discontinuation of a <DRUG>2065868</DRUG> drug treatment administered via route <DRUG_ROUTE>35608078</DRUG_ROUTE>, what were the date and reason for discontinuation?
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 2065868 AND de.route_concept_id = 35608078), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 1073418 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 16) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: What were the stop reason and date for <DRUG>2065868</DRUG> administered via <DRUG_ROUTE>35608078</DRUG_ROUTE> in the last 16 individuals who then underwent <PROCEDURE>1073418</PROCEDURE>?
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 2065868 AND de.route_concept_id = 35608078), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 1073418 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 16) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: For the most recent 16 patients treated using <PROCEDURE>1073418</PROCEDURE> after their last discontinuation of <DRUG>2065868</DRUG> via <DRUG_ROUTE>35608078</DRUG_ROUTE>, what were the discontinuation details?
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 2065868 AND de.route_concept_id = 35608078), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 1073418 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 16) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 2065868 AND de.route_concept_id = 35608078), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 1073418 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 16) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: What led to the discontinuation of <DRUG>2065868</DRUG> via route <DRUG_ROUTE>35608078</DRUG_ROUTE> and when did it occur in the 16 patients who most recently underwent a <PROCEDURE>1073418</PROCEDURE> procedure?
output: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 2065868 AND de.route_concept_id = 35608078), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 1073418 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 16) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

input: What's the entire volume of registered medical devices classified by device type up until 23 years ago?
output: SELECT de.device_concept_id, c.concept_name AS device_type, COUNT(*) AS total_registered_devices FROM device_exposure AS de JOIN concept AS c ON de.device_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE de.device_exposure_start_date < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '23 years') GROUP BY de.device_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY total_registered_devices DESC;

input: Did <PERSON_ID>1815833955608</PERSON_ID> get a dose of <DRUG>21135942</DRUG> during their initial ICU stay?
output: WITH first_icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 1815833955608 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN first_icu_visit fiv ON de.visit_detail_id = fiv.visit_detail_id WHERE de.person_id = 1815833955608 AND de.drug_concept_id = 21135942) AS prescribed_on_first_icu_visit;

input: Is there a notable change in <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> for patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> from the first hospital reading to the first ICU value from their last stay?
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

input: What is the change in the <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> of patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> from the first value measured on the first hospital visit compared to the first value measured on the last ICU visit?
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

input: Measure the variation in <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> of patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> between the first measurement of the first hospital visit and the initial measurement of the last ICU stay.
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

input: From the first hospital visit to the last ICU visit, how did the <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> of patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> change between the first values measured?
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

input: Can we observe a change in the <MEASUREMENT>21493228</MEASUREMENT> of patient <PERSON_ID>810181375</PERSON_ID> from their first hospital visit's first recorded value to the first value on their final ICU visit?
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 810181375 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), icu_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN icu_visit AS iv ON m.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1), hospital_measurement AS (SELECT m.value_as_number FROM measurement AS m JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON m.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id WHERE m.person_id = 810181375 AND m.measurement_concept_id = 21493228 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime, m.measurement_datetime LIMIT 1) SELECT hm.value_as_number AS first_hospital_value, im.value_as_number AS first_icu_value, im.value_as_number - hm.value_as_number AS value_difference FROM hospital_measurement AS hm CROSS JOIN icu_measurement AS im;

input: What is the number of patients diagnosed with <CONDITION>200527</CONDITION> within 3 months after <CONDITION>135526</CONDITION> diagnosis since last year?
output: WITH base_dates AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 135526 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 year'), next_condition AS (SELECT b.person_id FROM base_dates AS b JOIN condition_occurrence AS c ON b.person_id = c.person_id AND c.condition_concept_id = 200527 AND c.condition_start_date > b.condition_start_date AND c.condition_start_date <= b.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '3 months') SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS patient_count FROM next_condition;

input: Which specimen was collected during the <MEASUREMENT>1617202</MEASUREMENT> test carried out in the same month of the initial <CONDITION>198199</CONDITION> diagnosis for patient <PERSON_ID>13858183</PERSON_ID>?
output: WITH condition_patient AS (SELECT co.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 198199 AND co.person_id = 13858183 ORDER BY co.condition_start_datetime LIMIT 1), measurement_same_month AS (SELECT m.measurement_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_patient AS cp ON m.measurement_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', cp.condition_start_date) AND m.measurement_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', cp.condition_start_date) + INTERVAL '1 month' WHERE m.measurement_concept_id = 1617202 AND m.person_id = 13858183), specimen_from_measurement AS (SELECT fr.fact_id_2 FROM fact_relationship AS fr JOIN measurement_same_month AS msm ON fr.fact_id_1 = msm.measurement_id WHERE fr.domain_concept_id_1 = 21 AND fr.domain_concept_id_2 = 36) SELECT c.concept_name FROM specimen_from_measurement as sfm JOIN specimen AS s ON sfm.fact_id_2 = s.specimen_id JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id;

input: Which two diagnoses were most frequent in patients 18+ during the past month?
output: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 18 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 2;

input: How many hours ago did the second to last intake of <DRUG>36922465</DRUG> by patient <PERSON_ID>3094956</PERSON_ID> during the current icu visit?
output: WITH icu_visit AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE vd.person_id = 3094956 AND c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%' ORDER BY vd.visit_detail_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1), second_to_last_drug_time AS (SELECT de.drug_exposure_start_datetime FROM drug_exposure AS de JOIN icu_visit AS icu ON de.visit_detail_id = icu.visit_detail_id WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 36922465 ORDER BY de.drug_exposure_start_datetime DESC OFFSET 1 LIMIT 1) SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - sld.drug_exposure_start_datetime)) / 3600 AS hours_since_second_to_last FROM second_to_last_drug_time AS sld;

input: Did the parents or siblings of patient <PERSON_ID>13775792567</PERSON_ID> get diagnosed with condition <CONDITION>4347545</CONDITION> within a week after the patient's last diagnosis?
output: WITH parent_sibling AS (SELECT DISTINCT fr.fact_id_1 AS patient_id FROM fact_relationship AS fr WHERE fr.relationship_concept_id IN (4292398, 4232263) AND fr.fact_id_2 = 13775792567), patient_condition AS (SELECT co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 13775792567 AND co.condition_concept_id = 4347545 ORDER BY co.condition_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM condition_occurrence AS co2 JOIN parent_sibling AS ps ON co2.person_id = ps.patient_id JOIN patient_condition AS pc ON co2.condition_start_datetime >= pc.condition_start_datetime AND co2.condition_start_datetime <= pc.condition_start_datetime + interval '7 days' WHERE co2.condition_concept_id = 4347545);

input: Does the source value <SOURCE_VALUE>24477001015</SOURCE_VALUE> for device <DEVICE>37018132</DEVICE> have an unchanging OMOP source ID in March of this year?

input: Which ten diagnoses appeared most frequently on 9th March 2022?
output: SELECT v.concept_id, v.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN concept AS v ON c.condition_concept_id = v.concept_id WHERE c.condition_start_date = DATE '2022-03-09' GROUP BY v.concept_id, v.concept_name ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC LIMIT 10;

input: Provide the ten most common diagnoses for March 9, 2022.
output: SELECT v.concept_id, v.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS diagnosis_count FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN concept AS v ON c.condition_concept_id = v.concept_id WHERE c.condition_start_date = DATE '2022-03-09' GROUP BY v.concept_id, v.concept_name ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC LIMIT 10;

input: What is the stage of progression for patient <PERSON_ID>8675838477134123</PERSON_ID> diagnosed with <CONDITION>762653</CONDITION>?
output: WITH condition_id AS (SELECT co.condition_occurrence_id FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.person_id = 8675838477134123 AND condition_concept_id = 762653 ORDER BY condition_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT c.concept_name, c2.concept_name AS phase_detail FROM condition_id AS ci JOIN episode_event AS ee ON ci.condition_occurrence_id = ee.event_id AND ee.episode_event_field_concept_id = 1147127 JOIN episode AS e ON ee.episode_id = e.episode_id JOIN concept AS c ON e.episode_concept_id = c.concept_id JOIN concept AS c2 ON e.episode_object_concept_id = c2.concept_id WHERE c.concept_class_id = 'Disease Dynamic' ORDER BY episode_start_datetime DESC LIMIT 1;

input: Name the first specimen patient <PERSON_ID>187452996785135320</PERSON_ID> was tested for in their second hospital stay.

input: During the first hospital visit of patient <PERSON_ID>257381625636627410</PERSON_ID>, which measurement occurred at 7:12:33?
output: WITH first_visit AS (SELECT vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo WHERE vo.person_id = 257381625636627410 ORDER BY vo.visit_start_datetime LIMIT 1), matched_measurement AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN first_visit AS fv ON m.visit_occurrence_id = fv.visit_occurrence_id WHERE TO_CHAR(m.measurement_datetime, 'HH24:MI:SS') = '07:12:33') SELECT c.concept_name FROM matched_measurement AS mm JOIN concept AS c ON mm.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id;

input: What drug therapy was initiated within 3 months of <PROCEDURE>42873091</PROCEDURE> for <PERSON_ID>6564184274949</PERSON_ID> since 2012-09-01?
output: WITH po_filtered AS (SELECT po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po WHERE po.person_id = 6564184274949 AND po.procedure_concept_id = 42873091 AND po.procedure_date >= DATE '2012-09-01') SELECT DISTINCT c.concept_name FROM po_filtered AS pf JOIN drug_exposure AS de ON de.person_id = pf.person_id AND de.drug_exposure_start_datetime BETWEEN pf.procedure_datetime AND pf.procedure_datetime + INTERVAL '3 months' JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = de.drug_concept_id;
